    A

    addEdge(Node) - Method in class configs.Node
    Adds a directed edge from this node to the target node.
    addPublisher(Agent) - Method in class graph.Topic
    Registers an agent as a publisher on this topic.
    addServlet(String, String, Servlet) - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
    Registers a servlet to handle requests for the given HTTP method and URI prefix.
    addServlet(String, String, Servlet) - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
    Registers a servlet for the given HTTP method and URI prefix.
    Agent - Interface in graph
    Core interface for computational nodes in the pub-sub graph engine.
    asDouble - Variable in class graph.Message
    The message content interpreted as a double.
    asText - Variable in class graph.Message
    The message content interpreted as a UTF-8 string.

    B

    BinOpAgent - Class in configs
    Generic two-input binary-operation agent.
    BinOpAgent(String, String, String, String, BinaryOperator<Double>) - Constructor for class configs.BinOpAgent
    Creates a binary-operation agent and wires it to the topic manager.

    C

    callback(String, Message) - Method in class configs.BinOpAgent
    Accumulates input values and publishes the result of the binary operation.
    callback(String, Message) - Method in class configs.IncAgent
    Handles an incoming message by publishing value + 1 to the output topic.
    callback(String, Message) - Method in class configs.PlusAgent
    Accumulates input values and publishes their sum when both inputs are available.
    callback(String, Message) - Method in interface graph.Agent
    Handles an incoming message published on a subscribed topic.
    callback(String, Message) - Method in class graph.ParallelAgent
    Enqueues a message for asynchronous processing by the wrapped agent.
    close() - Method in class configs.BinOpAgent
    Unsubscribes from input topics and removes publisher registration.
    close() - Method in interface configs.Config
    Tears down the configuration and releases all wired agents.
    close() - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
    Unsubscribes all wired agents from topics and closes their parallel wrappers.
    close() - Method in class configs.IncAgent
    Releases resources (no-op for this agent).
    close() - Method in class configs.MathExampleConfig
    Releases resources (no-op; agents are not explicitly closed in this example).
    close() - Method in class configs.PlusAgent
    Releases resources (no-op for this agent).
    close() - Method in interface graph.Agent
    Releases resources held by this agent.
    close() - Method in class graph.ParallelAgent
    Stops the worker thread and closes the wrapped agent.
    close() - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
    Shuts down the server gracefully.
    close() - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
    Shuts down the server and releases all resources.
    close() - Method in class servlets.ConfLoader
    Releases servlet resources.
    close() - Method in class servlets.HtmlLoader
    Releases servlet resources.
    close() - Method in interface servlets.Servlet
    Releases any resources held by this servlet.
    close() - Method in class servlets.TopicDisplayer
    Releases servlet resources.
    Config - Interface in configs
    Lifecycle contract for loading and wiring agents into the computational graph.
    configs - package configs
     
    ConfLoader - Class in servlets
    Application servlet that handles the /upload endpoint for configuration deployment.
    ConfLoader() - Constructor for class servlets.ConfLoader
     
    create() - Method in interface configs.Config
    Loads the configuration and wires agents to topics.
    create() - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
    Reads the configuration file, instantiates agents, and wires them to topics.
    create() - Method in class configs.MathExampleConfig
    Creates and wires the three binary-operation agents.
    createFromTopics() - Method in class configs.Graph
    Rebuilds this graph from the current state of TopicManagerSingleton.

    D

    data - Variable in class graph.Message
    The raw byte content of the message.
    date - Variable in class graph.Message
    The timestamp when this message was created.

    G

    GenericConfig - Class in configs
    Reflection-based configuration loader that wires agents from a text file.
    GenericConfig() - Constructor for class configs.GenericConfig
     
    get() - Static method in class graph.TopicManagerSingleton
    Returns the singleton TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager instance.
    getAllTopics() - Method in class graph.TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
    Returns the live map of all registered topics.
    getContent() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
    Returns the raw bytes of the request body.
    getEdges() - Method in class configs.Node
    Returns the list of outgoing edges from this node.
    getGraphHTML(Graph, boolean) - Static method in class views.HtmlGraphWriter
    Builds a complete HTML graph visualization as a list of lines.
    getHttpCommand() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
    Returns the HTTP method from the request line.
    getLastMessage() - Method in class graph.Topic
    Returns the most recently published message on this topic.
    getMessage() - Method in class configs.Node
    Returns the message payload associated with this node.
    getName() - Method in class configs.BinOpAgent
    Returns the agent name.
    getName() - Method in interface configs.Config
    Returns the human-readable name of this configuration.
    getName() - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
    Returns the display name of this configuration loader.
    getName() - Method in class configs.IncAgent
    Returns the agent name.
    getName() - Method in class configs.MathExampleConfig
    Returns the display name of this configuration.
    getName() - Method in class configs.Node
    Returns the name of this node.
    getName() - Method in class configs.PlusAgent
    Returns the agent name.
    getName() - Method in interface graph.Agent
    Returns the unique display name of this agent.
    getName() - Method in class graph.ParallelAgent
    Returns the name of the wrapped agent.
    getParameters() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
    Returns the parameters map extracted from the query string and, in course/test mode, from additional key=value lines after the headers.
    getPubs() - Method in class graph.Topic
    Returns a defensive copy of the publisher list.
    getSubs() - Method in class graph.Topic
    Returns a defensive copy of the subscriber list.
    getTopic(String) - Method in class graph.TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
    Returns the topic with the given name, creating it if it does not yet exist.
    getUri() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
    Returns the full request URI as it appeared on the request line.
    getUriSegments() - Method in class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
    Returns the path portion of the URI split into segments.
    getVersion() - Method in interface configs.Config
    Returns the version number of this configuration.
    getVersion() - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
    Returns the version of this configuration loader.
    getVersion() - Method in class configs.MathExampleConfig
    Returns the version of this configuration.
    graph - package graph
     
    Graph - Class in configs
    Directed graph model representing the wiring between topics and agents.
    Graph() - Constructor for class configs.Graph
     

    H

    handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in class servlets.ConfLoader
    Processes a GET or POST request to the /upload endpoint.
    handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in class servlets.HtmlLoader
    Resolves the requested file from URI segments and writes an HTTP response.
    handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in interface servlets.Servlet
    Handles an incoming HTTP request and writes the response to the client.
    handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in class servlets.TopicDisplayer
    Publishes a message to a topic (if parameters are present) and returns an HTML table of all topic values.
    hasCycles() - Method in class configs.Graph
    Detects whether this graph contains a cycle using depth-first search.
    hasCycles() - Method in class configs.Node
    Detects whether a directed cycle is reachable from this node.
    HtmlGraphWriter - Class in views
    View-layer utility that generates HTML graph visualization pages.
    HtmlGraphWriter() - Constructor for class views.HtmlGraphWriter
     
    HtmlLoader - Class in servlets
    Servlet that serves static files from a directory under a registered URI prefix.
    HtmlLoader(String) - Constructor for class servlets.HtmlLoader
    Creates a static-file servlet rooted at the given directory.
    HTTPServer - Interface in server
    Contract for a minimal, servlet-based HTTP server.

    I

    IncAgent - Class in configs
    Agent that increments a numeric input by 1 and publishes the result.
    IncAgent(String[], String[]) - Constructor for class configs.IncAgent
    Creates an increment agent with the given subscription and publication topics.
    IncAgent(String, String) - Constructor for class configs.IncAgent
    Convenience constructor for a single-input, single-output increment agent.

    M

    MathExampleConfig - Class in configs
    Example configuration that wires a pipeline of three BinOpAgent instances.
    MathExampleConfig() - Constructor for class configs.MathExampleConfig
     
    Message - Class in graph
    Immutable value wrapper for data flowing through the pub-sub graph.
    Message(byte[]) - Constructor for class graph.Message
    Creates a message from a byte array.
    Message(double) - Constructor for class graph.Message
    Creates a message from a numeric value.
    Message(String) - Constructor for class graph.Message
    Creates a message from a string value.
    MyHTTPServer - Class in server
    Default HTTPServer implementation backed by a ServerSocket and a fixed thread pool.
    MyHTTPServer(int, int) - Constructor for class server.MyHTTPServer
    Creates a new HTTP server bound to the given port with a fixed-size thread pool.

    N

    name - Variable in class graph.Topic
    The unique name of this topic.
    Node - Class in configs
    A vertex in the Graph directed graph model.
    Node(String) - Constructor for class configs.Node
    Creates a new graph node with the given name.

    P

    ParallelAgent - Class in graph
    Decorator that executes an Agent's Agent.callback(java.lang.String, graph.Message) on a background worker thread.
    ParallelAgent(Agent, int) - Constructor for class graph.ParallelAgent
    Creates a parallel wrapper around the given agent with a bounded message queue.
    parseRequest(BufferedReader) - Static method in class server.RequestParser
    Parses an HTTP request from the given reader.
    PlusAgent - Class in configs
    Agent that adds two numeric inputs and publishes the sum.
    PlusAgent(String[], String[]) - Constructor for class configs.PlusAgent
    Creates a plus agent with the given subscription and publication topics.
    PlusAgent(String, String, String) - Constructor for class configs.PlusAgent
    Convenience constructor for a two-input, single-output addition agent.
    publish(Message) - Method in class graph.Topic
    Publishes a message to this topic and notifies all subscribers.

    R

    removePublisher(Agent) - Method in class graph.Topic
    Removes an agent from this topic's publisher list.
    removeServlet(String, String) - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
    Removes a previously registered servlet mapping.
    removeServlet(String, String) - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
    Removes a servlet mapping for the given HTTP method and URI prefix.
    RequestInfo(String, String, String[], Map<String, String>, byte[]) - Constructor for class server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
    Creates a new request info object with the parsed request data.
    RequestParser - Class in server
    Stateless utility for parsing HTTP/1.1 requests from a BufferedReader.
    RequestParser() - Constructor for class server.RequestParser
     
    RequestParser.RequestInfo - Class in server
    Immutable snapshot of a parsed HTTP request.
    reset() - Method in class configs.BinOpAgent
    Clears cached input values to Double.NaN.
    reset() - Method in class configs.IncAgent
    Resets internal state (no-op for this agent).
    reset() - Method in class configs.PlusAgent
    Clears cached input values so the agent waits for fresh messages.
    reset() - Method in interface graph.Agent
    Resets any internal state accumulated during processing.
    reset() - Method in class graph.ParallelAgent
    Resets the wrapped agent's internal state.
    run() - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
    Main server loop: binds a ServerSocket, accepts client connections, and dispatches each to the thread pool.

    S

    server - package server
     
    Servlet - Interface in servlets
    Core extension point for handling HTTP requests in the server framework.
    servlets - package servlets
     
    setConfFile(String) - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
    Sets the path to the configuration file.
    setMessage(Message) - Method in class configs.Node
    Sets the message payload associated with this node.
    start() - Method in interface server.HTTPServer
    Starts the server and begins accepting client connections.
    start() - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
    Starts the server accept loop on this thread.
    subscribe(Agent) - Method in class graph.Topic
    Registers an agent to receive messages published on this topic.

    T

    Topic - Class in graph
    A named pub-sub channel in the computational graph.
    TopicDisplayer - Class in servlets
    Application servlet that handles the /publish endpoint for topic message publication.
    TopicDisplayer() - Constructor for class servlets.TopicDisplayer
     
    TopicManagerSingleton - Class in graph
    Provides global access to the singleton TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager registry.
    TopicManagerSingleton() - Constructor for class graph.TopicManagerSingleton
     
    TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager - Class in graph
    Thread-safe registry of all Topic instances in the system.
    toString() - Method in class configs.Node
    Returns a string representation of this node.

    U

    unsubscribe(Agent) - Method in class graph.Topic
    Removes an agent from this topic's subscriber list.

    V

    views - package views
